briefs.title: Council to Consider: Status Update on Burnaby's 2025 Casino Gaming Reserve Fund
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to receive an information update on the city's Gaming Reserve — a fund built from casino revenue — showing $12.7M spent in 2025 and $11.7M remaining. No new spending decisions are being made at this meeting; Council will simply review how the fund was used last year.
